entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Collaborator who has a two-pager/PDF document that needs clear language about costs and vibe checks

entities.name: Vibe checks
entities.context: Cheap front-door filter to protect employer time and compute, ensuring only promising candidates receive full role-specific analysis

entities.name: Profile setup
entities.context: Stage 1 of applicant processing: analyzing their resume once

entities.name: Story capture
entities.context: Stage 2 of applicant processing: candidates record short work stories

entities.name: Role alignment
entities.context: Stage 3 of applicant processing: breaking roles into ~30 requirements and comparing to candidate stories and resume

entities.name: Resume analysis
entities.context: Process used during profile setup to analyze candidate resumes

entities.name: Work stories
entities.context: Short recorded narratives candidates provide about their professional experiences during story capture

entities.name: Employer-Facing positioning
entities.context: Communication approach aimed at employers explaining the value and cost model of the service

relationships.context: Ilya's two-pager/PDF needs clear language about vibe checks
Vibe checks are positioned as the cheap front-door filter in employer communications
Sequential stages in the applicant processing pipeline (1 → 2)
